entry.title: Not getting complete data from SAP T-code \n\pbs\fagll03
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

User is facing this problem.

Usually when we run the T-code \n\pbs\fagll03 in SAP for any account, It gives use all the transactions posted for the particular account. However, from last couple of months we have seen it is not generating complete report and generates only limited transactions. We are in ECC 6.0

Please suggest.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: How to print a pdf cheque form PMW?
entry.content:
Hello, 
We have developed a PDF based form to print our Cheque. Our pdf form is ZFIFAE850015_CHECK_UK. 

I'm facing an issue when trying to print this form. I read on internet that we should use program SAPFPAYM for Cheque PDF form printing. But when executing this program, I get error message Form ZFIFAE850015_CHECK_UK cannot be used for output management (Message No. BFIBL02702). 
With sapscript form, the program is RFFOUS_C. 

My questions are: 

  1. Can we print cheque form in ADOBE PDF?
  2. If yes, what is the program to print cheque form? Is it program SAPFPAYM?

entry.title: Message no. F2803
entry.content: Getting this error while updating vendor withholding tax details in "FI_WT_VENDOR_UPDATE" BAPI in SE37.

entry.title: How to download reports S_ALR_87013558 and S_ALR_87013533 in MS excel?
entry.content:
Unable to download reports S_ALR_87013558 and S_ALR_87013533 in MS excel. What is the correct way to enable downloading of report in excel?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Erro na F110 para fornecedor sem imposto
entry.content: Boa noite, estou com erro na F110. No dado mestre do fornecedor não tem imposto, e está correto pois não é para ter mesmo. Porém ao executar a F110 está ocorrendo o erro abaixo. Olhei na partida e tb não tem imposto. A proposta não teve erro. O erro acontece no pagamento. Alguém já passou por isso? Obrigada

entry.title: FAGL_FCV vs S_ALR_87012277
entry.content: I try to use tcode FAGL_FCV in our quality system to try and recreate a problem that our client is facing. I determine the accounts I want to use. However, no data is retrieved. But when I use tcode S_ALR_87012277 with the same selection of accounts, the data is there. Can anyone tell me if the comparaison I am making is correct? if so, why is the data not appearing in FAGL_FCV and if not, what should I compare with?

entry.title: Is it possible to display PDF by default in /OPT/VIM_WP image tab instead of XML?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to display PDF by default instead of XML in the image tab of /OPT/VIM_WP t-code even when the document is processed with XML.

Is there any configurations where we can update or any enhancements (BADIs) available for the same?

Thanks in Advance.

FIN (Finance) SAP Document Access by OpenText

entry.title: Allocate costs to asset without it being allocated in Acquisition Value nor APC Transaction in AW01N
entry.content:
A client wants to allocate some costs on asset but without it being allocated or displayed in acquisition value nor APC transaction in the transaction code: AW01N.

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: F-32 clear customer with amount zero
entry.content:
Hi experts!

I wonder if the transaction F-32 can clear customer without creating AB document.

Precisely, I have some customers having open items, but the total amount of them are equal to 0(zero).

Normally, I set the amount with the total of the open items selected, but in these cases is not possible to set 0 as the amount to clear because the standard will ignore it with a warning.

 

Thank you!

entry.title: FEBAN automation
entry.content: Hi, my client has a requirement where they want to automate the electronic bank statement posting through FEBAN, Can anyone support on this?

entry.title: Posting Vendor doc with BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST
entry.content:
I need to post a simple Vendor (payable) document with BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST.

The document consists of 3 line items:

  1. Vendor item (PK 31)
  2. GL item (PK 40, posting to GL account with CO object)
  3. Tax item (PK 40)

For these lines I fill the following BAPI tables:

  1. accountpayable
  2. accountgl
  3. accounttax

These tables have thus 1 line each. For each line the table currencyamount must be filled so that this table contains 3 lines. There are no more lines / table entries - the debugger shows 1 line for accountpayable, accountgl and accounttax + 3 lines for currencyamount. I believe that this concept is correct.

Despite this, BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_CHECK returns RW 014 FI/CO interface: Line item entered several times. I do not understand, which line is duplicated or what else could be wrong.

I will appreciate any hint.

thanks to all,

Jan

entry.title: FAGLL03H -> add fields to selection Screen
entry.content:
Hi,

i know how to add new fields (Z-fields) in the output list of FAGLL03H transaction but i need to SELECT this Z-fields in the selection screen before the list ist processed. 

Any ideas how to archive that without modifying ? Unfortunately SAP Docu ist VERY poor (as always) 😞

br Martin

entry.title: FAGLL03 - Display/Change Items (New) Error - Cursor Operation carried out with invalid cursor.
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

In T.code FAGLL03, I have given the GL Account, Company code and from data sources button, i selected database and archived and executed the transaction code. We are in ECC 6.0

I am getting the error" Cursor Operation carried out with invalid cursor." Refer to the screenshot.

Please suggest how to resolve the error.

Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: Can we run KSV5 transaction twice in a day for different periods
entry.content:
Hi Experts 

Can we run KSV5 transaction twice in sap for different periods

if yes, how do we add cost to cost center as there are 1000 of cost center

 

Regards

Jithendra Shivashankar

entry.title: Transaction IDCNAR - Credit limit field empty
entry.content:
Hello, 

when i run the IDCNAR transaction on a production environment, i have the credit limit field empty while on the quality environment this field is filled.

can you please tell me this is due to what ?

Thank you

entry.title: Change Profit Center before PO creation
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I want to change the profit center when I click the save button to create purchased order.

I try to use Badi ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST - PROCESS_ACCOUNT method. But it is not work.

I checked the coding part, when the program execute the set_data method, there is a default value 'X' for the my_cust_firewall_on  parameter. It cause the update failed. 

No idea how to change this field correctly.

entry.title: Sorting Method not working for Correspondence - Periodic Account Statement
entry.content:
Hi Team

We need your guidance to apply sorting and get the line items sorted as per the document date on generating correspondence for customer account statement. We are using the standard sorting method for correspondence P1/P2/P3/P4 and all are giving the same results. The list generated is not sorted properly. We tried creating one sample sorting method Z1 to sort the line items based on document date only but its also not giving the expected results

Please help us to resolve this issue asap. Thank you

entry.title: Pricing error in item 000010 in VF03.
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

In T.code VF03, When I entered the billing document 9285324272, I am getting the error"Pricing error in item 000010" I checked the tab conditions, Condition type PI01-Intercompany price is displaying "Condition type PI01 is not determined using condition records" and also I clicked on analysis , it displays " Condition record is missing".

In Condition type ZPRS- Internal price Condition type ZPRS-Intenal price is displaying "Condition type ZPRS is not determined using condition records"also I clicked on analysis , it displays " Condition record is missing".

Please suggest, how to resolve the issue.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Why negative credit exposure in open orders and deliveries.
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I have been having an issue in which negative values ​​are appearing in customers' credit exposure. When this happens I run the UKM_COMMITMENT_REBUILD program, but after 1 month it happens again.

Does anyone know why this happens and if there is any way to prevent this from happening?

entry.title: Over-Delivery Qty Tolerance with the customer credit management
entry.content:
Hi all, Hope you are all doing well

There is a case when the credit limit for the customer is 100K $ and he already consumed 90K $ of the credit limit, then the customer requested a sales order with 10K $ with the remaining credit limit and he can release his order successfully, but in the outbound delivery level, the material was having a tolerance 5% more, which means the order value increased with 500 $ more than the customer credit limit.

What I need is to know if there are any functionality in the standard or customized way can make the system to allow to exceed the customer credit limit with the over-delivery tolerance amount only?

I appreciated your usual support, suggestions, consultations
